name: Use Case A: image captioning and VQA
refined_prompt: Recreate this street scene as a polished, realistic daytime image while preserving the four visible cars, road, buildings, lawn, and clear weather. Keep composition and subject identity consistent while producing a clean high-quality visual variation. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Visual anchors: A balanced landscape image dominated by blue, neutral gray, green tones with sky, cars, road. Local fallback approximation: The scene appears outdoors with a bright upper sky region, darker road/foreground, colored vehicle-like regions, and blocky background structures. Key visible elements: sky, cars, road, buildings. Avoid distorted text, watermarks, and artifacts. Improve prompt faithfulness while preserving the main composition and clearly applying the requested transformation. Address this critique: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.84, color similarity 0.11, brightness shift -0.00, and change level 0.16 for variation mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.576. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.
human_notes: Manual review: the street layout, cars, road, buildings, and clear weather remain recognizable; the result is coherent but still has demo-level polish.

name: Use Case B: style-guided transformation
refined_prompt: Transform this cat image into a vivid cyberpunk digital painting with neon lighting, glowing eyes, futuristic city background, holographic accents, high contrast, and cinematic detail while preserving the cat as the main subject. Use bold artistic style cues, distinctive color palette, cinematic contrast, and unmistakable stylized visual treatment. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Visual anchors: A balanced landscape image dominated by mixed color, red, blue tones with sky, cat, fur. Local fallback approximation: The scene appears to contain a warm-toned central animal/face-like subject against a simpler background. Key visible elements: sky, cat, fur, eyes. Avoid distorted text, watermarks, and artifacts. Make the transformation much stronger: neon lighting, futuristic environment, high contrast, cinematic detail, and unmistakable cyberpunk visual style. Address this critique: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.92, color similarity 0.03, brightness shift -0.04, and change level 0.08 for stylization mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.757. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.
human_notes: Manual review: the cat remains the central subject and the cyberpunk direction is visible through stronger color and contrast; more neon detail would improve it.

name: Use Case C: prompt-based enhancement
refined_prompt: Strongly enhance this dark outdoor mountain landscape into a bright golden-hour scene with warm sunlight, orange sky glow, vivid saturated colors, detailed terrain, and a visible atmospheric moon. Improve lighting, detail, contrast, color balance, sharpness, and overall image quality while preserving the scene. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Visual anchors: A dark landscape image dominated by blue, neutral gray, mixed color tones with sky, vegetation, ground. Local fallback approximation: The scene appears outdoors with a darker foreground and sky-like upper region, suggesting a low-light landscape. Key visible elements: sky, vegetation, ground, mountains, moon, night sky. Avoid distorted text, watermarks, and artifacts. Make the enhancement visibly stronger: bright golden-hour light, warm sunlight, vivid colors, high detail, and clear atmospheric glow. Address this critique: Decision policy: ACCEPT if visual_relevance >= 7, prompt_faithfulness >= 7, transformation_quality >= 7, and automatic signal >= threshold; otherwise REVISE. The generated image has pixel similarity 0.97, color similarity 0.07, brightness shift 0.02, and change level 0.03 for enhancement mode. Automatic signal (heuristic_proxy) is 0.638. CLIP was unavailable or disabled, so this score is a labeled color/brightness heuristic proxy rather than true CLIP similarity.
human_notes: Manual review: the landscape structure and moon are preserved while the enhancement improves visibility; the golden-hour effect could be richer.
